creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerard Seibert from comment #2)

Hi, Gerard! I have that idea that after the port landed in the ports tree I/we need to give it at least couple of weeks to see that it's not completely broken and only then add it to the defaults.

Seems most of the people don't share such a cautious approach. Well, port seems to work, so it was added to the defaults list.
